revision.comment: Bot: remove [[Category:Sn crud]] (crud category cleanup) [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23993722414|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:厳島神社 (洲本市)]]



{{Source Citation|date=June 2020}}
{{infobox religious building
 | name=Itsukushima Shrine (厳島神社)
 | image=[[File:Itsukushima-jinja Sumoto Awaji Island Japan03n.jpg|300px]]<br/ ><small>Worship Hall and Main Hall</small>
 | address={{ill|Hyōgo Prefecture|en|Hyōgo Prefecture|qid=Q130290|lt=Hyōgo Prefecture|1=Hyōgo Prefecture}}{{ill|Sumoto, Hyōgo|en|Sumoto, Hyōgo|qid=Q369628|lt=Sumoto City|1=Sumoto, Hyōgo}}本町四丁目1-27
 | location={{Wiki Coordinates (2-stage)|34|20|21.7|N|134|53|45.8|E|region:JP-28_type:landmark|display=inline,title}}
 | deity={{ill|Ichikishima-hime|ja|市杵島姫命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ichikishima-hime||1=Ichikishima-hime|2=fr|3=Ichikishimahime|4=ja|5=イチキシマヒメ|6=zh|7=市寸島比賣命|8=ru|9=Итикишима-химэ|10=de|11=Ichikishima-hime}}
 | shrine Rank=
 | main hall=
 | founding=
 | festival=November 21–23
 | ritual=
 | map={{location map|Hyōgo, Japan|lat_deg=34|lat_min=20|lat_sec=21.7|lon_deg=134|lon_min=53|lon_sec=45.8|label=Itsukushima Shrine (厳島神社)|position=center|width=200|float=center}}
}}

[[File:Itsukushima-jinja Sumoto Awaji Island Japan02n.jpg|thumb|Worship Hall]]

'''Itsukushima Shrine''' (厳島神社) is a {{ill|Shinto shrine|en|Shinto shrine|qid=Q845945|lt=Shinto Shrine|1=Shinto shrine}} located in {{ill|Hyōgo Prefecture|en|Hyōgo Prefecture|qid=Q130290|lt=Hyōgo Prefecture|1=Hyōgo Prefecture}} {{ill|Sumoto, Hyōgo|en|Sumoto, Hyōgo|qid=Q369628|lt=Sumoto City|1=Sumoto, Hyōgo}}.

Since the deity {{ill|Ichikishima-hime|ja|イチキシマヒメ|1=Ichikishima-hime|lt=Ichikishima-hime|lt=Ichikishima-hime|lt_ja=市杵島姫命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ichikishima-hime|13=User:Immanuelle/Ichikishima-hime|qq=}} was syncretized with {{ill|Benzaiten|en|Benzaiten|qid=Q818468|qid=Q818468|lt=Benzaiten|1=Benzaiten}}, it is still affectionately known as {{ill|Benzaiten of Awaji Island|ja|弁財天|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Benzaiten of Awaji Island|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 弁才天|1=Benzaiten|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q818468}}. The autumn grand festival, the Benten Festival, is held for three days from November 21 (with the main festival on the 22nd), attracting a large number of worshippers.

== Deity ==
* {{ill|Ichikishima-hime|ja|イチキシマヒメ|1=Ichikishima-hime|lt=Ichikishima-hime|lt=Ichikishima-hime|lt_ja=市杵島姫命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ichikishima-hime|13=User:Immanuelle/Ichikishima-hime|qq=}}

=== Shrine Buildings on the Grounds ===
* Shusse Inari Shrine
* {{ill|Sanpou Arakami|ja|三宝荒神|lt=Arakami Shrine|lt_ja=荒神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sanpou Arakami|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=Sanbo Kojin|qid=Q13577821}}
* {{ill|Inadate Shrine|ja|稲基神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Inadate Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=Q135579271|1=Inadate Shrine}}: Guardian deity of the Inada clan and proxy of {{ill|Sumoto Castle|en|Sumoto Castle|qid=Q5369846|lt=Sumoto Castle Proxy|1=Sumoto Castle}} during the Edo period.

== Historic Sites on the Grounds ==
* The haiku monument of {{ill|Matsuo Bashō|en|Matsuo Bashō|qid=Q5676|lt=Matsuo Basho|1=Matsuo Bashō}}
* The song monument of {{ill|Suzuki Shigetane|en|Suzuki Shigetane|qid=Q20040844|lt=Suzuki Shigetane|1=Suzuki Shigetane}}
* The monument for the novel "Otose" by {{ill|Funayama Kaoru|ja|船山馨|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Funayama Kaoru|1=Kaoru Funayama|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11614036}}

== Surroundings ==
* {{ill|Sumoto City Hall|ja|洲本市役所|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sumoto City Hall|1=Sumoto City Hall|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q122353291}}
* {{ill|Sumoto Post Office|ja|洲本郵便局|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sumoto Post Office|1=Sumoto Post Office|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11556546}}
* {{ill|Sumoto Hachiman Shrine|ja|洲本八幡神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sumoto Hachiman Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=Q135579272|1=Sumoto Hachiman Shrine}}

== Access ==
* 600m south from {{ill|Sumoto Bus Center|ja|洲本バスセンター|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sumoto Bus Center|1=Sumoto Bus Center|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11556520}}.

== External Links ==
{{Commonscat|Itsukushima-jinja (Sumoto)}}
* [http://www.page.sannet.ne.jp/urakami/ A Snapshot of the History of the Island and Awaji Island Benzaiten-san Itsukushima Shrine]
* [http://home.intercity.or.jp/users/numata/syoukai/benten.htm All About Awaji Island]

{{shinto-stub}}

{{translated page|ja|厳島神社 (洲本市)|version=90816106|comment=Imported full ja history}}
